get.description:
Get orchestrator status.

Returns current state, worker status, and agent statuses.

Pause the orchestrator.

Stops spawning new workers but allows active workers to complete.

schema.title: Response Pause Api Orchestrator Pause Post

post.description:
Resume the orchestrator.

Resumes normal operation after pause.

schema.title: Response Resume Api Orchestrator Resume Post

Set a field to null to clear the DB override for that field.

post.description:
Manually trigger a strategic reflection cycle.

Signals the engine to run reflections on its next tick (avoids DB lock
contention by letting the engine's own session handle the work).

schema.title: Response Trigger Reflection Cycle Api Orchestrator Reflection Trigger Post

get.description: Summarize reflection/initiative/sweep pipeline state.

schema.title: Response Get Intelligence Summary Api Orchestrator Intelligence Summary Get

get.description: List initiatives proposed from reflection cycles.

schema.title: Response List Initiatives Api Orchestrator Intelligence Initiatives Get

post.description: Apply a Lobs decision to an initiative and convert approved ideas into tasks.

schema.title: Response Decide Initiative Api Orchestrator Intelligence Initiatives  Initiative Id  Decide Post

post.description:
Process multiple initiative decisions in a single batch.

This is the RECOMMENDED way for Lobs to review initiatives:
1. Fetch all pending: GET /intelligence/initiatives?status=proposed
2. Review as a batch with full context (spot duplicates, prioritize)
3. Submit all decisions together: POST /intelligence/initiatives/batch-decide

The batch processor is forgiving:
- Missing initiative IDs are reported as errors but don't block the batch
- Each decision is processed independently
- Full stats returned: approved/deferred/rejected counts

Returns:
    {
        "total": <number of decisions in request>,
        "processed": <number successfully processed>,
        "approved": <number approved and converted to tasks>,
        "deferred": <number deferred for later>,
        "rejected": <number rejected>,
        "failed": <number that failed (not found or validation error)>,
        "results": [
            {
                "initiative_id": "...",
                "status": "approved|deferred|rejected",
                "task_id": "..." (only if approved),
                ...
            },
            ...
        ],
        "errors": [
            {"initiative_id": "...", "error": "..."},
            ...
        ]
    }

schema.title: Response Batch Decide Initiatives Api Orchestrator Intelligence Initiatives Batch Decide Post

get.description: Get per-agent daily autonomy budgets for auto-approved initiatives.

schema.title: Response Get Autonomy Budgets Api Orchestrator Intelligence Budgets Get
Response Update Autonomy Budgets Api Orchestrator Intelligence Budgets Put

get.description:
Get current provider configuration and health status.

Returns provider config (enabled/disabled, models, priorities, fallback chains)
combined with real-time health data from the orchestrator.

schema.title: Response Get Provider Config Api Orchestrator Providers Get

put.description:
Update provider configuration.

Updates provider settings (enabled/disabled, models, priorities, fallback chains).
Changes apply to newly spawned workers.

schema.title: Response Update Provider Config Api Orchestrator Providers Put

get.description:
Get detailed provider health report.

Returns per-provider and per-model health scores, success rates,
active cooldowns, and disabled status.

schema.title: Response Get Provider Health Api Orchestrator Providers Health Get

post.description:
Reset health state for a provider.

Clears cooldowns, error counts, and re-enables if auto-disabled.
Manual intervention for recovering from provider issues.

schema.title: Response Reset Provider Health Api Orchestrator Providers  Provider  Reset Post

post.description:
Manually enable or disable a provider.

Disabled providers will not be used for new tasks until re-enabled.

schema.title: Response Toggle Provider Api Orchestrator Providers  Provider  Toggle Post

get.description:
Get backup system status.

Returns last backup time, next scheduled backup, backup count, and total size.

post.description:
Trigger an immediate backup.

Creates a new backup outside the regular schedule.

get.description:
List all available backups.

Returns backups sorted by creation time (newest first) with filenames,
sizes, and timestamps.

post.description:
Restore database from a backup.

**WARNING:** This will replace the current database with the backup.
A backup of the current database is automatically created before restoring.

Args:
    filename: Name of the backup file to restore from
    confirm: Must be set to true to proceed (safety check)

OpenClaw calls this when it starts/stops processing a message.

get.description:
Dashboard-optimized usage view: tasks per model/provider, tokens, costs.

Returns everything the Mission Control dashboard needs in a single call:
- Summary totals (tasks, tokens, cost)
- Per-provider breakdown (tasks, tokens, cost, avg latency)
- Per-model breakdown (tasks, tokens, cost)
- Daily time series for charts
- Top models by task count and by cost

schema.title: Response Get Usage Dashboard Api Usage Dashboard Get
